title: ochna arborea
intro: Ochna arborea, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant due to its distinctive red berries and yellow flowers, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ochna arborea include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Ochna arborea typically involve the use of its roots, leaves, and berries, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
